summary.intent: Add last_active field to the etf (entire-fzf) session list so users can resume recent agent sessions regardless of their status, and sort by last_active instead of started_at.
summary.outcome: Sessions are now sorted by last_active (descending) and the display column shows last_active instead of started_at. Change was committed to the entire-fzf plugin.

repo: entire-fzf is a zsh plugin at ~/Projects/me/entire-fzf/entire-fzf.plugin.zsh that wraps Claude Code session management with fzf
Session listing uses jq to process and sort session data; sort key was changed from started_at to last_active

code.finding: _entire_session_list uses jq with sort_by(.last_active) | reverse; display column updated from started_at to last_active

workflow: The motivation for last_active over started_at: ended sessions may still be worth resuming if they were recently active, so recency of activity is more useful than creation time for the resume workflow
